cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalating Coercive Interrogation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lucas progresses from formal suspicion to aggressive, psychologically manipulative tactics in his interactions with Walter, using intimidation, graphic narratives, and physical dominance to assert control.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: assessing Walter as a known criminal risk
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: maintaining surveillance while applying sustained psychological pressure
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: blurred line between investigation and personal vendetta; potential abuse of authority

cross_scene_arcs.title: Deterioration of Professional Boundaries
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lucas moves from institutional oversight to uninvited intrusion and degrading conduct, undermining his role as a law enforcement officer through verbal abuse and physical intimidation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: lack of accountability for coercive and unprofessional behavior

cross_scene_arcs.title: Adversarial Relationship Intensification
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Lucas's perception of Walter evolves from suspect to irredeemable 'scum,' marked by increasing hostility, contempt, and a refusal to entertain innocence, shaping a one-sided antagonism.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: views Walter as a suspect with violent history
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: mutual distrust and potential for violent escalation

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Observation to Intimacy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Vicki moves from silently observing Walter to initiating contact, building intimacy, and ultimately confronting emotional rupture after his confession.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Vicki observes Walter from a distance, showing early interest.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Emotional connection shattered by Walter's revelation of his criminal past.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether attraction and moral judgment can coexist after traumatic disclosure.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting Workplace Hostility
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Vicki repeatedly resists gender-based harassment and misconduct, escalating from personal defiance to direct confrontation with authority figures.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Vicki fends off catcallers and asserts independence after work.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She physically invades Mary-Kay's space and threatens violence to protect Walter.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Institutional tolerance of harassment and lack of accountability persist.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Mutual Trauma and Emotional Vulnerability
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After emotional rupture, Vicki and Walter engage in reciprocal disclosure of past trauma, creating fragile emotional reconnection.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Vicki is shocked and emotionally withdrawn after Walter's confession.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Both share histories of abuse, establishing deeper, though uneasy, intimacy.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The long-term impact of their traumas on trust and relationship stability remains uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Cycle of Connection and Abandonment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Vicki repeatedly seeks closeness with Walter, only to be met with resistance or rejection, leading to cycles of emotional engagement and disengagement.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Vicki insists on staying the night despite Walter's discomfort.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She briefly reconnects by holding his hand after previously leaving due to his rejection.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Walter's emotional unavailability continues to destabilize their bond.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Isolation and Emotional Shutdown
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Walter resists emotional engagement, pushes away intimacy, and ultimately rejects self-reflection, culminating in the destruction of his journal after a psychological breakdown.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: emotionally guarded and dismissive of therapy
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: emotionally shut down, actively suppressing internal and external confrontation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: ongoing resistance to vulnerability and inability to sustain connection

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confrontation with Trauma and Violent Reenactment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Walter experiences a traumatic flashback during a violent attack on Candy, regains awareness, and collapses emotionally, revealing the unresolved abuse from his own childhood.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: unprocessed childhood abuse resurfacing under stress
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: traumatized, fugitive, and emotionally shattered after violent outburst
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: unresolved childhood abuse and its cyclical impact on behavior

cross_scene_arcs.title: Struggle for Emotional Connection and Rejection
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Walter begins a physical relationship with Vicki but rejects her after confessing his past, leading to emotional isolation and later grief in the aftermath of violence.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: engages in physical intimacy while withholding emotional disclosure
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: emotionally overwhelmed and alone after pushing others away
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: inability to sustain intimacy despite desire for connection

cross_scene_arcs.title: Path Toward Self-Reflection and Healing
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Walter moves from rejecting therapy to beginning journaling and eventually acknowledging his guilt and the need for time to heal, showing incremental steps toward emotional accountability.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: accepts that healing takes time and expresses hope for forgiveness
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether he can achieve self-forgiveness and reconciliation with his sister

cross_scene_arcs.title: Institutional and Personal History Revealed
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Walter is processed by police, and his criminal history—conviction for first-degree offenses involving young girls—is formally revealed, establishing his status as a formerly incarcerated individual with a violent past.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: identified as a previously convicted sex offender
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: impact of past conviction on current legal and social standing

cross_scene_arcs.title: Impulse, Pursuit, and Psychological Fragmentation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Walter acts on an unexplained impulse to follow a girl, later experiences visions of a girl during emotional collapse, and ultimately attacks Candy in a flashback, linking impulsive behavior to unresolved trauma.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: initiates pursuit of a girl without clear motive
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: commits violence while dissociated, then flees in awareness
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: origin and meaning of the girl vision and its connection to his trauma
